name: web-app-drakel
description: Root orchestration for the drakel monorepo: git hooks, commit linting and cross-package quality gates.

scripts.lint: yarn --cwd backend lint && yarn --cwd frontend lint
scripts.lint:strict: yarn --cwd backend lint:strict && yarn --cwd frontend lint:strict
scripts.lint:fix: yarn --cwd backend lint:fix && yarn --cwd frontend lint:fix
scripts.format: yarn --cwd backend format && yarn --cwd frontend format
scripts.format:check: yarn --cwd backend format:check && yarn --cwd frontend format:check
scripts.type-check: yarn --cwd backend type-check && yarn --cwd frontend type-check
scripts.knip: yarn --cwd backend knip && yarn --cwd frontend knip
scripts.test: yarn --cwd backend test && yarn --cwd frontend test
scripts.verify: yarn lint:strict && yarn format:check && yarn type-check && yarn knip && yarn test
